Class OpenAiItemAdapter

java.lang.Object
uno.anahata.asi.openai.OpenAiItemAdapter
public class OpenAiItemAdapter extends Object
Pure content adapter for the OpenAI Responses API, strictly translating Anahata's domain model into the "Items" architecture.

Supports text, images, and generic files (including audio fallback).

    Whether to include pruned parts in the generated items list.
    private final String
    targetModelId
    The model ID for which this adapter is preparing items.

  • Field Details

    • API_MAPPER

      private static final com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.ObjectMapper API_MAPPER
      Internal mapper for Responses API item JSON generation.

    • anahataMessage

      private final AbstractMessage anahataMessage
      The original message to be translated.

    • includePruned

      private final boolean includePruned
      Whether to include pruned parts in the generated items list.

    • targetModelId

      private final String targetModelId
      The model ID for which this adapter is preparing items.

  • Constructor Details

    • OpenAiItemAdapter

      public OpenAiItemAdapter()

  • Method Details

    • toItems

      public List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> toItems() throws Exception
      Translates the message into a list of Responses API "Items".
      Returns:
      A list of ObjectNodes representing the items.
      Throws:
      Exception - on serialization errors.

    • toModelTurnItems

      private List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> toModelTurnItems(AbstractModelMessage<?> modelMsg) throws Exception
      Translates a model turn into a sequence of top-level API items.
      Parameters:
      modelMsg - The model message to translate.
      Returns:
      A list of items (messages, reasoning, etc.).
      Throws:
      Exception - on translation failures.

    • getCiRoot

      private HostedCodeExecutionCallPart getCiRoot(AbstractPart part)
      Resolves the root code interpreter call for a part.
      Parameters:
      part - The part to inspect.
      Returns:
      The parent call, or null.

    • getOrCreateCiNode

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode getOrCreateCiNode(Map<HostedCodeExecutionCallPart, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> ciNodes, HostedCodeExecutionCallPart root, List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> items, boolean sameModel)
      Retrieves or initializes a code interpreter item node in the items list.
      Parameters:
      ciNodes - The tracking map for active code interpreter items.
      root - The root call part identifying the execution session.
      items - The top-level items list.
      sameModel - Whether the model IDs match for identity preservation.
      Returns:
      The (possibly new) code interpreter JSON node.

    • updateCiNode

      private void updateCiNode(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode ciNode, AbstractPart part)
      Appends a part (source code, logs, or generated image) to an existing code interpreter item.
      Parameters:
      ciNode - The target code interpreter node.
      part - The execution-related part to append.

    • createFunctionCallNode

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode createFunctionCallNode(AbstractToolCall<?,?> tc, boolean sameModel) throws Exception
      Creates a Responses API 'function_call' item from an Anahata tool call.
      Parameters:
      tc - The Anahata tool call part.
      sameModel - Whether to preserve the original provider ID.
      Returns:
      The formatted JSON node.
      Throws:
      Exception - on argument serialization failures.

    • createWebSearchCallNode

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode createWebSearchCallNode(WebSearchCallPart mscp, boolean sameModel)
      Creates a Responses API 'web_search_call' item.
      Parameters:
      mscp - The web search call part.
      sameModel - Whether to preserve the original provider ID.
      Returns:
      The formatted JSON node.

    • createReasoningNode

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode createReasoningNode(AbstractPart part, ModelTextPart mtp, boolean sameModel)
      Creates a Responses API 'reasoning' item for encrypted or unencrypted chains.
      Parameters:
      part - The abstract part.
      mtp - The model text part containing reasoning.
      sameModel - Whether to preserve the original provider ID.
      Returns:
      The formatted JSON node.

    • flushMessageItem

      private void flushMessageItem(List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> items, com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode item)
      Commits a pending message item to the items list if it contains content.
      Parameters:
      items - The top-level items list.
      item - The pending message node.

    • toToolResponseItems

      private List<com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode> toToolResponseItems(AbstractModelMessage<?> modelMsg)
      Translates tool execution results and multimodal attachments into 'function_call_output' and developer messages.
      Parameters:
      modelMsg - The model message containing the responses.
      Returns:
      A list of response and attachment items.

    • toUserOrSystemItem

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode toUserOrSystemItem()
      Translates a user or system message into a single Responses API 'message' item.
      Returns:
      The formatted JSON node, or null if empty.

    • toRagItem

      private com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ObjectNode toRagItem()
      Translates the Anahata RAG context into a 'user' role 'message' item.
      Returns:
      The formatted JSON node, or null if empty.

    • addPartToContentArray

      private void addPartToContentArray(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ArrayNode contentArray, AbstractPart part, String role)
      Maps an Anahata part into the 'content' array of a Responses API message item.
      Parameters:
      contentArray - The target JSON array.
      part - The part to translate.
      role - The role of the enclosing message (used for text type selection).

    • addBlobToContentArray

      private void addBlobToContentArray(com.fasterxml.jackson.databind.node.ArrayNode contentArray, String mimeType, byte[] data)
      Appends a binary part (image or audio) to a content array using OpenAI-specific multimodal formats.
      Parameters:
      contentArray - The target JSON array.
      mimeType - The MIME type of the data.
      data - The raw bytes.
      Throws:
      AiProviderException - if the format is unsupported for direct inclusion.
